problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: The key to How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? is Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI — specifically Default mode network — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
